required_preferences.fact: Pauses Saturday game nights during regional soccer playoff weekends — prioritizes Max's games and reschedules game night for non-travel weekends only

supersedes.fact: Never cancels Saturday game nights — reschedules any conflicting events instead

required_preferences.fact: Hosts monthly potluck dinners focused on family and low-sensory environments to accommodate her father's new needs, often inviting fewer people to reduce stress

supersedes.fact: Hosts monthly potluck dinners for close friends and family at her townhouse — never goes more than six weeks without one

required_preferences.fact: Plans family vacations collaboratively with the kids — never books without their input
Schedules a mid-week video catch-up with her children during monthly Seattle trips to maintain connection and update them on work progress
Completes online grocery shopping every Thursday night — never shops in person on weekends
Participates in virtual collaborative vacation planning sessions with her kids and ex-husband, using video calls and shared documents since in-person trips or errands are restricted.

persona: A single parent planning annual vacations for their two children
